title: Keto Eastern Toor Dal Stir Fry
description: A keto-friendly twist on the traditional Eastern Toor Dal dish, made with a flavorful stir fry
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped bitter gourd and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Toor Dal, Middle Eastern spices, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Note: Traditionally, Toor Dal is cooked with a significant amount of oil and ghee, but we've adapted this recipe to be keto-friendly by reducing the amount of oil and omitting the ghee.
